meanings.usage: 指在某个领域最先开展探索或取得成就的人
表示率先做某件事或开发某类事物
后可接名词、双宾语或不定式，常见结构offer sth. to sb. / offer sb. sth.
常用搭配make an offer
常用搭配make an attempt to do sth. / at doing sth.
后接不定式，attempt to do sth.
指陆地与海洋交界的狭长地带
指为车辆、飞机等提供动力的装置
可表示机器故障，也可表示做某事未成功，常见结构fail to do sth.
常用被动结构be forced to do sth.，表示不得不做某事
可指物理力量或军事力量
指物体在液体或气体表面停留不沉没
是late的最高级形式，修饰名词表示最近出现的事物
修饰旅行、飞行等表示经由陆地的
后接名词或动名词，表示完成某项任务或活动
修饰名词表示没有缺失部分的
后接距离名词，表示行进了某段长度的路程
常用搭配test flight表示试飞，test exam表示测验
表示检查事物的功能或人的能力
后接表示时间的名词，说明事件持续的时长
修饰人或事物表示属于某个特定地区的

phrases.usage: 表示飞机起飞，也可引申为事业突然成功、脱掉衣物等含义

examples.en: The plane is scheduled to take off at 9 a.m.
examples.zh: 这架飞机计划上午9点起飞。

examples.en: After three years of hard work, his career finally took off.
examples.zh: 经过三年的努力，他的事业终于腾飞了。

phrases.usage: 此处表示接走、营救某人，也可表示捡起、学会（知识/技能）、接收到信号等含义

examples.en: The lifeboat picked up all the survivors from the sunken ship.
examples.zh: 救生艇救起了沉船上的所有幸存者。

examples.en: I picked up some Japanese when I was travelling in Tokyo.
examples.zh: 我在东京旅行的时候学会了一些日语。

phrases.usage: 表示放弃、停止做某事，后可接名词或动名词

examples.en: No matter how difficult it is, you should never give up your dream.
examples.zh: 无论有多难，你都不应该放弃自己的梦想。

examples.en: My father gave up smoking last year for his health.
examples.zh: 我爸爸为了健康去年戒烟了。

phrases.usage: 用来表示“看起来似乎/好像”，可描述真实情况，也可描述虚拟的假设

examples.en: It looked as if it was going to rain, so we took an umbrella with us.
examples.zh: 看起来好像要下雨了，所以我们带了一把伞。

examples.en: He smiled happily, and it looked as if he had won the game.
examples.zh: 他笑得很开心，看起来好像已经赢了比赛。

phrases.usage: 表示出发、动身，也可表示引爆、引发某事

examples.en: We set off at dawn so that we could get to the mountain top before noon.
examples.zh: 我们黎明就出发，这样就能在中午之前到达山顶。

examples.en: The news set off a heated discussion among the students.
examples.zh: 这个消息在学生中引发了激烈的讨论。

phrases.usage: 表示“被迫做某事”，强调因外界原因不得不做非主观意愿的事

examples.en: Because of the heavy snow, the driver was forced to stop the car.
examples.zh: 因为大雪，司机被迫把车停下来。

examples.en: Many small companies were forced to close during the economic crisis.
examples.zh: 经济危机期间很多小公司被迫倒闭。

phrases.usage: 表示“尝试、试图做某事”，后可接to do或at doing

examples.en: He made an attempt to pass the driving test, but he failed because of nervousness.
examples.zh: 他尝试通过驾照考试，但因为紧张失败了。

examples.en: The team made an attempt at climbing the highest mountain in the country.
examples.zh: 这支队伍尝试攀登该国最高的山峰。

phrases.usage: 表示“在距离……不到……的范围内”，用来描述距离、时间等的接近程度

examples.en: The hotel is within 10 minutes' walk of the railway station.
examples.zh: 这家酒店距离火车站步行不到10分钟。

examples.en: The team was within one point of winning the championship.
examples.zh: 这支队伍差一分就能赢得冠军。

grammar.title: 过去完成时
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某个时间或动作之前已经发生或完成的动作，即“过去的过去”
grammar.structure: 主语 + had + 动词过去分词 + 其他
grammar.usage: 常和before, until, when等引导的时间状语从句连用，明确两个过去动作的先后顺序

examples.en: He had travelled only seven miles across the Channel when his engine failed.
examples.zh: 他刚在海峡上飞了7英里，发动机就出故障了。

examples.en: Bleriot had been making planes since 1905 and this was his latest model.
examples.zh: 布莱里奥从1905年起就开始制造飞机，这是他最新型号的飞机。

examples.en: A week before, he had completed a successful overland flight during which he covered twenty-six miles.
examples.zh: 一周之前，他刚刚成功完成了一次26英里的陆上飞行。

grammar.title: 定语从句中的“介词+which”结构
grammar.definition: 当关系代词which在定语从句中作介词的宾语时，可将介词提前到which之前，构成“介词+which”的结构，用来修饰表示事物的先行词
grammar.structure: 先行词（事物） + 介词 + which + 从句其他部分
grammar.usage: 介词的选择通常根据从句中的动词、形容词与介词的固定搭配，或者先行词与介词的搭配来确定

examples.en: A week before, he had completed a successful overland flight during which he covered twenty-six miles.
examples.zh: 一周之前，他刚刚成功完成了一次26英里的陆上飞行。（which指代flight，during which = during the flight）

examples.en: This is the house in which Lu Xun once lived.
examples.zh: 这就是鲁迅曾经住过的房子。（which指代house，in which = in the house）

examples.en: The book for which you are looking is on the shelf.
examples.zh: 你正在找的那本书在书架上。（which指代book，for which = for the book）

grammar.title: 时间状语before引导的时间状语从句
grammar.definition: before引导时间状语从句时，表示主句的动作发生在从句动作之前，可翻译为“在……之前”“过了多久才……”
grammar.structure: 主句 + before + 从句（一般过去时）
grammar.usage: 当主句描述的是一段时间的流逝时，常翻译为“过了……才发生某事”

examples.en: Over a year passed before the first attempt was made.
examples.zh: 过了一年多人们才进行第一次尝试。

examples.en: Several months went by before we finished the whole project.
examples.zh: 过了好几个月我们才完成整个项目。

examples.en: I had waited for two hours before he finally showed up.
examples.zh: 我等了两个小时他才终于出现。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 时间 + passed before + 事件

original.en: Over a year passed before the first attempt was made.
original.zh: 过了一年多人们才进行第一次尝试。

imitations.en: Three hours passed before the rescue team arrived at the accident site.
imitations.zh: 过了三个小时救援队才抵达事故现场。

imitations.en: Many years passed before the old temple was rebuilt and opened to the public.
imitations.zh: 过了很多年这座古庙才被重建并对公众开放。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + had done sth. when + 另一过去动作

original.en: He had travelled only seven miles across the Channel when his engine failed and he was forced to land on the sea.
original.zh: 他刚在海峡上飞了7英里，发动机就出故障了，他被迫降落在海面上。

imitations.en: I had just finished my homework when my friend invited me to play basketball.
imitations.zh: 我刚写完作业，我的朋友就邀请我去打篮球。

imitations.en: We had walked only two hundred metres when it started to rain heavily.
imitations.zh: 我们刚走了200米，就开始下大雨了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: It looked as if + 从句

original.en: It looked as if there would be an exciting race across the Channel.
original.zh: 看起来似乎会有一场激动人心的横跨海峡的比赛。

imitations.en: It looked as if we would have to cancel the picnic because of the bad weather.
imitations.zh: 看起来我们因为糟糕的天气得取消野餐了。

imitations.en: He looked so pale that it looked as if he was seriously ill.
imitations.zh: 他脸色这么苍白，看起来好像病得很重。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + 动作 + lasted + 时长

original.en: His great flight lasted thirty-seven minutes.
original.zh: 他这次伟大的飞行持续了37分钟。

imitations.en: The opening ceremony of the sports meeting lasted two and a half hours.
imitations.zh: 运动会的开幕式持续了两个半小时。

imitations.en: The heavy rain lasted almost the whole day and caused floods in many areas.
imitations.zh: 这场大雨持续了几乎一整天，在很多地区引发了洪水。
